name: getWellknownOrgMetadata
description: Retrieve the Org metadata. Retrieves the org metadata, which includes the org ID, configured custom domains, and authentication pipeline

name: listApiTokens
description: List all API token metadata. Lists all the metadata of the active API tokens

name: revokeCurrentApiToken
description: Revoke the current API token. Revokes the API token provided in the Authorization header

name: getApiToken
description: Retrieve an API token's metadata. Retrieves the metadata for an active API token by `apiTokenId`

name: upsertApiToken
description: Upsert an API token network condition. Upserts an API Token Network Condition by `apiTokenId`

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: revokeApiToken
description: Revoke an API token. Revokes an API token by `apiTokenId`

name: listFeatures
description: List all features. Lists all self-service features for your org

name: getFeature
description: Retrieve a feature. Retrieves a feature by ID

name: listFeatureDependencies
description: List all dependencies. Lists all feature dependencies for a specified feature. A feature's dependencies are the features that it requires to be enabled in order for itself to be enabled.

name: listFeatureDependents
description: List all dependents. Lists all feature dependents for the specified feature. A feature's dependents are the features that need to be disabled in order for the feature itself to be disabled.

name: updateFeatureLifecycle
description: Update a feature lifecycle. Updates a feature's lifecycle status. Use this endpoint to enable or disable a feature for your org. Use the `mode=force` parameter to override dependency restrictions for a particular feature. Normally, you can't enable a feature if it has one or more dependencies that aren't enabled. When you use the `mode=force` parameter while enabling a feature, Okta first tries to enable any disabled features that this feature may have as dependencies. If you don't pass the `mo…

mode.description: Indicates if you want to force enable or disable a feature. Supported value is `force`.

name: getOrgSettings
description: Retrieve the Org general settings. Retrieves the Org General Settings

name: updateOrgSettings
description: Update the Org general settings. Updates partial Org General Settings

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: replaceOrgSettings
description: Replace the Org general settings. Replaces the Org General Settings for your Okta org

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listOrgContactTypes
description: List all org contact types. Lists all org contact types for your Okta org

name: getOrgContactUser
description: Retrieve the contact type user. Retrieves the ID and the user resource associated with the specified contact type

name: replaceOrgContactUser
description: Replace the contact type user. Replaces the user associated with the specified contact type

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getThirdPartyAdminSetting
description: Retrieve the org third-party admin setting. Retrieves the third-party admin setting. See [Configure third-party administrators](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=csh_admin-third) in the Okta product documentation.

name: updateThirdPartyAdminSetting
description: Update the org third-party admin setting. Updates the third-party admin setting. This setting allows third-party admins to perform administrative actions in the Admin Console, but they can't do any of the following: * Receive Okta admin email notifications * Contact Okta support * Sign in to the Okta Help Center See [Configure third-party administrators](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=csh_admin-third) in the Okta product documentation.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getOrgPreferences
description: Retrieve the org preferences. Retrieves preferences of your Okta org

name: setOrgHideOktaUIFooter
description: Set the hide dashboard footer preference. Sets the preference to hide the Okta End-User Dashboard footer for all end users of your org

name: setOrgShowOktaUIFooter
description: Set the show dashboard footer preference. Sets the preference to show the Okta UI footer for all end users of your org

name: getAerialConsent
description: Retrieve Okta Aerial consent for your org. Retrieves the Okta Aerial consent grant details for your Org. Returns a 404 Not Found error if no consent has been granted.

name: grantAerialConsent
description: Grant Okta Aerial access to your org. Grants an Okta Aerial account consent to manage your org. If the org is a child org, consent is taken from the parent org. Grant calls directly to the child are not allowed.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: revokeAerialConsent
description: Revoke Okta Aerial access to your org. Revokes access of an Okta Aerial account to your Org. The revoke operation will fail if the org has already been added to an Aerial account.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getOktaCommunicationSettings
description: Retrieve the Okta communication settings. Retrieves Okta Communication Settings of your org

name: optInUsersToOktaCommunicationEmails
description: Opt in to Okta user communication emails. Opts in all users of this org to Okta communication emails

name: optOutUsersFromOktaCommunicationEmails
description: Opt out of Okta user communication emails. Opts out all users of this org from Okta communication emails

name: getOrgOktaSupportSettings
description: Retrieve the Okta Support settings. Retrieves Okta Support Settings for your org

name: listOktaSupportCases
description: List all Okta Support cases. Lists all Okta Support cases that the requesting principal has permission to view

name: updateOktaSupportCase
description: Update an Okta Support case. Updates access to the org for an Okta Support case: * You can enable, disable, or extend access to your org for an Okta Support case. * You can approve Okta Support access to your org for self-assigned cases. A self-assigned case is created and assigned by the same Okta Support user.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: extendOktaSupport
description: Extend Okta Support access. Extends the length of time that Okta Support can access your org by 24 hours. This means that 24 hours are added to the remaining access time. > **Note:** This resource is deprecated. Use the [Update an Okta Support case](/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/OrgSettingSupport/#tag/OrgSettingSupport/operation/updateOktaSupportCase) resource to extend Okta Support access for a support case. > For the corresponding Okta Admin Console feature, see [Give access to Okta…

name: grantOktaSupport
description: Grant Okta Support access. Grants Okta Support temporary access to your org as an administrator for eight hours > **Note:** This resource is deprecated. Use the [Update an Okta Support case](/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/OrgSettingSupport/#tag/OrgSettingSupport/operation/updateOktaSupportCase) resource to grant Okta Support access for a support case. > For the corresponding Okta Admin Console feature, see [Give access to Okta Support](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=se…

name: revokeOktaSupport
description: Revoke Okta Support access. Revokes Okta Support access to your org > **Note:** This resource is deprecated. Use the [Update an Okta Support case](/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/OrgSettingSupport/#tag/OrgSettingSupport/operation/updateOktaSupportCase) resource to revoke Okta Support access for a support case. > For the corresponding Okta Admin Console feature, see [Give access to Okta Support](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=settings-support-access).

name: getAutoAssignAdminAppSetting
description: Retrieve the Okta Admin Console assignment setting. Retrieves the org setting to automatically assign the Okta Admin Console when an admin role is assigned

name: updateAutoAssignAdminAppSetting
description: Update the Okta Admin Console assignment setting. Updates the org setting to automatically assign the Okta Admin Console when an admin role is assigned > **Note:** This setting doesn't apply to the `SUPER_ADMIN` role. > When you assign the `SUPER_ADMIN` role to a user, the Admin Console is always assigned to the user regardless of the `autoAssignAdminAppSetting` setting.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getClientPrivilegesSetting
description: Retrieve the default public client app role setting. Retrieves the org setting to assign the [Super Admin role](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=ext_superadmin) to new public client apps

name: assignClientPrivilegesSetting
description: Assign the default public client app role setting. Assigns the [Super Admin role](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?type=oie&id=ext_superadmin) as the default role for new public client apps

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: createChildOrg
description: Create an org. Creates an org (child org) that has the same features as the current requesting org (parent org). A child org inherits any new features added to the parent org, but new features added to the child org aren't propagated back to the parent org. > **Notes:** > * Some features associated with products, such as Atspoke, Workflows, and Okta Identity Governance, aren't propagated to the child org. > * Wait at least 30 seconds after a 201-Created response before you make API requests to …

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listPrincipalRateLimitEntities
description: List all principal rate limits. Lists all Principal Rate Limit entities considering the provided parameters

filter.description: Filters the list of principal rate limit entities by the provided principal type (`principalType`). For example, `filter=principalType eq "SSWS_TOKEN"` or `filter=principalType eq "OAUTH_CLIENT"`.

after.description: The cursor to use for pagination. It's an opaque string that specifies your current location in the list and is obtained from the `Link` response header. See [Pagination](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#pagination).

limit.description: Specifies the number of items to return in a single response page.

name: createPrincipalRateLimitEntity
description: Create a principal rate limit. Creates a new principal rate limit entity. Okta only allows one principal rate limit entity per org and principal.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getPrincipalRateLimitEntity
description: Retrieve a principal rate limit. Retrieves a principal rate limit entity by `principalRateLimitId`

principalRateLimitId.description: ID of the principal rate limit

name: replacePrincipalRateLimitEntity
description: Replace a principal rate limit. Replaces a principal rate limit entity by `principalRateLimitId`

principalRateLimitId.description: ID of the principal rate limit

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getRateLimitSettingsAdminNotifications
description: Retrieve the rate limit admin notification settings. Retrieves the currently configured Rate Limit Admin Notification Settings

name: replaceRateLimitSettingsAdminNotifications
description: Replace the rate limit admin notification settings. Replaces the Rate Limit Admin Notification Settings and returns the configured properties

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getRateLimitSettingsPerClient
description: Retrieve the per-client rate limit settings. Retrieves the currently configured Per-Client Rate Limit Settings

name: replaceRateLimitSettingsPerClient
description: Replace the per-client rate limit settings. Replaces the Per-Client Rate Limit Settings and returns the configured properties

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getRateLimitSettingsWarningThreshold
description: Retrieve the rate limit warning threshold percentage. Retrieves the currently configured threshold for warning notifications when the API's rate limit is exceeded

name: replaceRateLimitSettingsWarningThreshold
description: Replace the rate limit warning threshold percentage. Replaces the Rate Limit Warning Threshold Percentage and returns the configured property

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listTrustedOrigins
description: List all trusted origins. Lists all trusted origins

q.description: A search string that prefix matches against the `name` and `origin`

filter.description: [Filter](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#filter) trusted origins with a supported expression for a subset of properties. You can filter on the following properties: `name`, `origin`, `status`, and `type` (type of scopes).

after.description: After cursor provided by a prior request

name: createTrustedOrigin
description: Create a trusted origin. Creates a trusted origin

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getTrustedOrigin
description: Retrieve a trusted origin. Retrieves a trusted origin

name: replaceTrustedOrigin
description: Replace a trusted origin. Replaces a trusted origin

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: deleteTrustedOrigin
description: Delete a trusted origin. Deletes a trusted origin

name: activateTrustedOrigin
description: Activate a trusted origin. Activates a trusted origin. Sets the `status` to `ACTIVE`.

name: deactivateTrustedOrigin
description: Deactivate a trusted origin. Deactivates a trusted origin. Sets the `status` to `INACTIVE`.

name: listApiServiceIntegrationInstances
description: List all API service integration instances. Lists all API Service Integration instances with a pagination option

after.description: The cursor to use for pagination. It is an opaque string that specifies your current location in the list and is obtained from the `Link` response header. See [Pagination](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#pagination).

name: createApiServiceIntegrationInstance
description: Create an API service integration instance. Creates and authorizes an API Service Integration instance

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getApiServiceIntegrationInstance
description: Retrieve an API service integration instance. Retrieves an API Service Integration instance by `id`

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

name: deleteApiServiceIntegrationInstance
description: Delete an API service integration instance. Deletes an API Service Integration instance by `id`. This operation also revokes access to scopes that were previously granted to this API Service Integration instance.

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

name: listApiServiceIntegrationInstanceSecrets
description: List all API service integration instance secrets. Lists all client secrets for an API Service Integration instance by `apiServiceId`

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

name: createApiServiceIntegrationInstanceSecret
description: Create an API service integration instance secret. Creates an API Service Integration instance Secret object with a new active client secret. You can create up to two Secret objects. An error is returned if you attempt to create more than two Secret objects.

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

name: deleteApiServiceIntegrationInstanceSecret
description: Delete an API service integration instance secret. Deletes an API Service Integration instance Secret by `secretId`. You can only delete an inactive Secret.

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

secretId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance Secret

name: activateApiServiceIntegrationInstanceSecret
description: Activate an API service integration instance secret. Activates an API Service Integration instance Secret by `secretId`

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

secretId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance Secret

name: deactivateApiServiceIntegrationInstanceSecret
description: Deactivate an API service integration instance secret. Deactivates an API Service Integration instance Secret by `secretId`

apiServiceId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance

secretId.description: `id` of the API Service Integration instance Secret

name: replaceOktaPersonalAdminSettings
description: Replace the Okta Personal admin settings. Replaces Okta Personal admin settings in a Workforce org

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listPersonalAppsExportBlockList
description: List all blocked email domains. Lists all blocked email domains which are excluded from app migration

name: replaceBlockedEmailDomains
description: Replace the blocked email domains. Replaces the list of blocked email domains which are excluded from app migration

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.
